description: Brazilian criminal faction based in Acre, founded around 2013 in the Rio Branco penitentiary complex. It operates drug trafficking along the Bolivia border and is allied with the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC). Engaged in violent conflict with Comando Vermelho (CV) and rival faction Ifara for control of drug routes and territories. Present in all municipalities of Acre.

country_links.evidence_quote: o grupo expandiu suas operações para a Bolívia , consolidando-se na rota transfronteiriça de drogas e armas.
country_links.context: The organization expanded its operations into Bolivia and controls drug trafficking routes on the border.
